entries.title: Dead Code Path Detector
entries.notes: Instruments the page to log which conditional branches execute, then surfaces unused paths in a DevTools panel. Buildable as a content script with runtime instrumentation. Emerging interest in code quality tooling as bundle sizes grow.
entries.pain: Production JavaScript bundles contain dead code paths that are impossible to trace without runtime analysis

entries.title: API Latency Scatterplot
entries.notes: Captures network request timing and plots against query parameter combinations to spot latency patterns. Uses built-in Performance API and a simple D3 scatterplot. Niche but high value for backend-heavy teams.
entries.pain: Slow API endpoints are hard to correlate with request parameters without custom logging infrastructure

entries.title: JSON-LD Structured Data Inspector
entries.notes: Parses all JSON-LD from the page, validates against schema.org, and reports errors inline with the source. Simple DOM parsing + schema.org API lookup. Growing importance as SEO increasingly depends on structured data.
entries.pain: Validating JSON-LD structured data requires external tools or manual copy-pasting to schema validators

entries.title: Third-Party Script Cost Reporter
entries.notes: Uses Resource Timing API to report each external script's download time, execution time, and blocking impact. Lightweight panel overlay. Supply chain security concerns are driving demand for script auditing.
entries.pain: Third-party scripts silently bloat page weight and block rendering but impact is invisible until production

entries.title: HTTP Archive File Analyzer
entries.notes: Imports HAR files, renders waterfall charts, flags slow requests, and exports summaries. Pure file parsing + visualization, no external dependencies. Useful for sharing capture sessions with teammates.
entries.pain: HAR files are opaque without visualization tools and no browser has built-in HAR analysis

entries.title: DOM Mutation Reporter
entries.notes: Hooks MutationObserver to log all DOM mutations with stack traces and timestamps. Helps debug React/Vue/Svelte re-render cascades. Directly useful for performance debugging.
entries.pain: JavaScript frameworks dynamically update the DOM and there's no easy way to track what changed and why

entries.title: Email Tracking Pixel Detector
entries.notes: Scans rendered email content for 1x1 images and network requests matching known tracker domains. Browser-level analysis is novel. Privacy awareness is rising sharply post-GDPR.
entries.pain: Marketing emails contain invisible tracking pixels that report when and where I opened them

entries.title: Password Breach Monitor
entries.notes: Scrapes form fields on page load, checks hashes against breach databases locally, alerts silently. Requires careful UX to avoid being creepy. High consumer demand for proactive breach alerting.
entries.pain: I have no way to know if my accounts are compromised without manually checking Have I Been Pwned

entries.title: Social Media Tracker Map
entries.notes: Visualizes tracker connections on social platforms as a live graph. Uses RequestMapGenerator concept adapted for real-time. Strong consumer interest in understanding data collection.
entries.pain: I can't see all the trackers active on social media sites without loading separate network analyzers

entries.title: Conference Lead Qualifier
entries.notes: Scans uploaded business cards or typed notes, enriches with LinkedIn/company data via public APIs. Mobile-first workflow with desktop enrichment. Trade show ROI tools are underserved.
entries.pain: Collecting business cards at conferences leaves me with a pile of contacts and no context for outreach

entries.title: Cold Email Reply Analyzer
entries.notes: Provides unique tracking links and subjects per email variant, reports reply rates aggregated in a panel. Simple link cloaking + reply detection. Sales tooling market is growing rapidly.
entries.pain: I send outreach sequences but have no visibility into which subject lines or copy actually get replies

entries.title: LinkedIn Headline Optimizer
entries.notes: Analyzes current headline against engagement patterns from public data, suggests rewrites. Uses LLM for suggestions with A/B variant generation. Recruitment tools market is expanding.
entries.pain: Writing LinkedIn headlines that get profile views requires guesswork and constant testing

entries.title: AI Conversation Token Counter
entries.notes: Intercepts API calls to LLMs, tracks token counts per conversation and cumulatively. Displays running total in extension badge. Demand is exploding as AI usage becomes mainstream.
entries.pain: I lose track of how many tokens I've used in AI conversations and can't budget for the month

entries.title: AI Output History Vault
entries.notes: Captures and stores AI outputs to local IndexedDB with search and tagging. Simple overlay panel for recall. Growing need as people use AI for substantive work.
entries.pain: My AI chat history gets lost when tabs close and there's no persistent scratchpad for important outputs

entries.title: AI Prompt Diff Viewer
entries.notes: Creates lightweight diffs between consecutive prompts sent to AI APIs, stores locally. Side-by-side diff view in panel. Directly useful for power users tweaking prompts.
entries.pain: Iterating on AI prompts without version history means losing track of what worked and what didn't

entries.title: Web Article Summarizer Pro
entries.notes: Extracts article content via Readability, sends to local LLM or API, returns structured summary with key points. Buildable with reader mode APIs. Productivity tools remain consistently popular.
entries.pain: Long articles require reading the full piece to extract key takeaways, eating up valuable time

entries.title: Reading Time Budget Keeper
entries.notes: Tracks time spent on article-heavy sites, warns when approaching daily reading budget. Simple time tracking + configurable thresholds. News fatigue is a real pain point.
entries.pain: I fall down rabbit holes of articles without realizing I've spent an hour on content I don't need

entries.title: Tab Group Auto-Namer
entries.notes: Uses AI to analyze tab URL and content, auto-names tab groups intelligently. Chrome tab group API is now stable. Real workflow improvement for power browsers.
entries.pain: Managing dozens of tabs with default labels makes finding the right tab a frustrating search

entries.title: Kubernetes Pod Status Checker
entries.notes: Connects to k8s API with local config, surfaces pod status in extension badge. Requires some config but very actionable for devops. K8s adoption continues to grow.
entries.pain: Checking Kubernetes pod status requires either kubectl access or logging into a cloud console

entries.title: Quota Usage Pulse
entries.notes: Parses API responses for rate limit headers, tracks usage over time, warns before exhaustion. Generic approach works across many APIs. Developer frustration with quotas is universal.
entries.pain: API rate limits hit unexpectedly because I have no visibility into my usage against limits

entries.title: External Link Auditor
entries.notes: Validates all external links on a page on demand, reports status codes in a sortable table. Fetch API + batch checking. QA tooling demand remains steady.
entries.pain: Checking if external links are broken requires clicking each one or running separate crawler tools

entries.title: Cookie Consent GDPR Score
entries.notes: Analyzes cookie banners, consent management platforms, and cookie storage against GDPR criteria, outputs compliance score. Rule-based analysis is tractable. GDPR awareness is high.
entries.pain: I can't quickly assess if a site's cookie consent is compliant with GDPR requirements

entries.title: WebGL Frame Rate Monitor
entries.notes: Uses requestAnimationFrame timing to calculate real FPS, overlays live counter. Minimal API surface, works on any WebGL page. Game devs and 3D web developers need this.
entries.pain: Debugging WebGL performance requires external GPU profilers that don't run in CI or browser contexts

entries.title: Page Scroll Heatmap Generator
entries.notes: Tracks scroll depth buckets across sessions, generates visual heatmap overlay. Local-only storage, exportable reports. Simpler alternative to full analytics suites for small sites.
entries.pain: Understanding where visitors scroll on my landing page requires expensive analytics tools
